name: Muffins Basic and Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C). Grease or line 12 muffin cups with parchment paper.
2. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the egg with a fork. Add milk and vegetable oil; mix well.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined. The batter will be lumpy.
5. Fill each muffin cup about half to two-thirds full with batter using a spoon or ice cream scoop.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the pan and serve immediately with butter, jam, marmalade, or as desired.
Variations:
GINGER MUFFINS: Add finely diced candied ginger to the flour mixture before adding liquid.
BANANA PECAN MUFFINS: Use only half a cup of milk. Add chopped pecans and ground nutmeg to the flour. Include mashed banana with the egg, milk, and oil.
BLUEBERRY MUFFINS: Toss washed blueberries with the flour mixture before adding liquid.
ORANGE MUFFINS: Place orange sections on top of each muffin after baking; lightly sprinkle with sugar.
CHEESE MUFFINS: Fold grated sharp yellow cheese into the batter during the last few strokes.
SURPRISE MUFFINS: Fill cups one-third full, add jelly in the center, then fill to two-thirds full.
COCONUT MUFFINS: Add shredded coconut during the final mixing stage. Serve with butter and milk.
CHIVE MUFFINS: Fold chopped chives into the batter at the end of mixing.
